name: text-stats-ai
description: Text Stats Ai tools powered by MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: word_count
tools.description: Comprehensive word, character, sentence, and paragraph counting.

tools.description: Estimate reading time at given words-per-minute (default 238 adult average).

tools.description: Analyze keyword frequency and density in text.
